title: Government Gazette Staatskoerant Republic of South Africa
MADLANGA COMMISSION BREAKS FOR EASTER RECESS

STATEMENT BY JEREMY MICHAELS, The Judicial Commission of Inquiry into Criminality, Political Interference and Corruption in the Criminal Justice System has today, 17 December 2025, delivered its Interim Report to President Cyril Ramaphosa
COMMISSION WARNS PUBLIC OF ACTS OF IMPERSONATING JUSTICE MBUYISELI MADLANGA
Mr Senzo Mchunu, the Minister of Police who is on a leave of absence, is scheduled to appear before the Commission at 14h00 tomorrow (Tuesday), 2 December 2025.
STATEMENT BY JEREMY MICHAELS, The Commission has noted with profound sadness the brutal killing of one of its witnesses, Mr Marius van der Merwe.
The Judicial Commission of Inquiry into Criminality, Political Interference and Corruption in the Criminal Justice System will resume at 14h00 tomorrow, Wednesday 19 November 2025.

STATEMENT BY JEREMY MICHAELS, SPOKESPERSON OF THE JUDICIAL COMMISSION OF INQUIRY. The Judicial Commission of Inquiry into Criminality, Political Interference and Corruption in the Criminal Justice System will enter Phase Two of the inquiry tomorrow (Tuesday), 18 November 2025.

STATEMENT BY JEREMY MICHAELS, SPOKESPERSON OF THE JUDICIAL COMMISSION OF INQUIRY INTO CRIMINALITY, POLITICAL INTERFERENCE AND CORRUPTION IN THE CRIMINAL JUSTICE SYSTEM. WILL RESUME PUBLIC HEARINGS ON 26 JANUARY 2026
By agreement between Major-General Senona and the Commission’s Evidence Leaders, the following is ordered:

STATEMENT BY JEREMY MICHAELS, SPOKESPERSON OF THE JUDICIAL COMMISSION OF INQUIRY INTO CRIMINALITY, POLITICAL INTERFERENCE AND CORRUPTION IN THE CRIMINAL JUSTICE SYSTEM WILL TODAY (Monday) HOLD ITS FIRST PUBLIC HEARING FOR 2026.

DIRECTIONS REGARDING THE USE OF CAMERAS AT HEARINGS OF THE JUDICIAL 
COMMISSION OF INQUIRY INTO CRIMINALITY, POLITICAL INTERFERENCE AND 
CORRUPTION IN THE CRIMINAL JUSTICE SYSTEM

OPENING REMARKS BY JUSTICE MBUYISELI MADLANGA, CHAIRPERSON OF THE JUDICIAL COMMISSION OF INQUIRY INTO CRIMINALITY, POLITICAL INTERFERENCE AND CORRUPTION IN THE CRIMINAL JUSTICE SYSTEM ARISING FROM THE SPECIFIC ALLEGATIONS MADE PUBLIC BY LIEUTENANT GENERAL NHLANHLA MKHWANAZI ON 6 JULY 2025
